# Stella Atelier — Luxury Fashion Boutique Dubai

## About
Stella Atelier is a luxury fashion boutique in Dubai, UAE, located in Gate Village 4, Level 1, DIFC. Opened in 2019, we offer curated collections from international designers and exclusive pieces for the discerning woman.

## Services
- Curated luxury fashion: Celine, Loro Piana, Max Mara, Roland Mouret and emerging designers
- Private styling sessions (by appointment)
- Wardrobe consultation
- Event and occasion dressing
- International shipping via DHL Express
- Bespoke alterations and tailoring

## Location
Gate Village 4, Level 1, DIFC, Dubai, UAE
Open daily 10:00 – 22:00

## Contact
- Email: hello@stellaatelier.ae
- Phone: +971 4 123 4567
- WhatsApp: +971 50 123 4567

## Price Range
AED 800 – AED 25,000+
